_doc: Manual override names applied by the scripts/dpgen wrapper after autogeneration. Each rule renames the identifier only in FIELD contexts (field declaration, selector v.X, struct-literal X:, String() return) - TYPE contexts (type X struct, func (t X), X{} constructor) remain untouched.

field_renames._doc: Attribute info.services.type. Generator emits `InfoServicesType` both as the list-element type wrapper and as the field name; HEAD style renames the field to ServiceType while keeping the type as InfoServicesType.
